name: Buddy
description: Buddy is full of energy and loves being around people. He thrives on attention, enjoys walks, and would suit an active home where he can be part of the family.

name: Tom
description: Tom is a playful and determined cat who loves to chase and explore. He has a mischievous side but also enjoys relaxing in a calm indoor environment.

name: Charlie
description: Charlie is a loyal and intelligent dog who forms strong bonds with his owner. He enjoys routine, exercise, and would suit a home where he can feel secure and valued.

name: Peter Rabbit
description: Peter is a curious and adventurous rabbit who enjoys exploring his surroundings. He would suit a patient owner who can provide a safe and stimulating environment.

name: Spike
description: Spike is calm, strong, and naturally protective. She is gentle with people but benefits from experienced handling and a home with plenty of space.

name: Stuart Little
description: Stuart is a small but confident mouse with a big personality. He is friendly, adaptable, and enjoys interaction and gentle handling.

name: Rodney
description: Rodney is sociable and enjoys companionship. He would thrive in a home where he has company and regular interaction.

name: Zara
description: Zara is an alert and independent animal who requires specialist care. She is best suited to a sanctuary environment with experienced handlers.

name: Willie
description: Willie is intelligent and highly responsive, showing strong awareness of his surroundings. He requires specialist care and is suited to a sanctuary environment focused on marine life.
